name: tx_deferred_halt
deferred_op: FSIN (D9 FE) -- transcendental, m3-fpu-spec.md DEFERRED set
note: NOT a differential func test: QEMU executes FSIN, the RTL must HALT. Gated by verif/tests/run_x87_boundary.sh, which asserts the loud HALT directly. This manifest lives one level deep (tx_deferred_halt/halt/) so verify.sh's depth-2 corpus discovery (find -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name manifest.json) does NOT pull it into the differential gate, where the QEMU-vs-RTL length mismatch would (incorrectly) read as a divergence.
